[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1010110111 7
3 1110101111 8
4 1111111011 9
5 1001101111 7
6 1111101010 7
7 0111110111 8
